title: ASSOC. PROF. DOĞAN ERBAHAR'S STUDY IS IN THE COVER OF THE WORLD-FAMOUS CHEMICAL COMMUNICATION!
content:
Student

News

Details

ASSOC. PROF. DOĞAN ERBAHAR'S STUDY IS IN THE COVER OF THE WORLD-FAMOUS CHEMICAL COMMUNICATION!

Department of Mechanical Engineering member Assoc. Dr. Doğan Erbahar’s latest study has been published in the field of Chemical Communications, the publication of the Royal Society of Chemistry, one of the most prestigious scientific publishers in the world.

In the research, which has been formed as a result of the collaboration of scientists working in different disciplines such as Physics, Chemistry and Bioengineering, the group focused on metal oxide skeletal structures from promising materials in today's technology and a structure with high degree of structural and thermal stability was investigated. Assoc. Dr. Doğan Erbahar has explained the mechanism of occurrence of the magnetic phenomenon observed in the studied structure.

These types of structures are expected to become more common in future applications related to chemistry, energy and the environment.
